title: analytics — published events
description: 22 published events covering capture lifecycle, delivery lifecycle, batching, circuit-breaker transitions, identity resolution, and semantic events (funnel step, experiment variant). All events dispatched afterCommit so a rollback doesn't leak side effects to listeners.

events.name: AnalyticsEventCaptured
events.trigger: AnalyticsEventObserver.created — event row inserted into analytics_events.
consumers: marketing::CorrelateFunnelListener (Wave 5) — correlates funnel steps to marketing attribution when category='funnel_step'

events.name: AnalyticsEventDispatched
events.trigger: DispatchAnalyticsEventJob completed — all eligible providers have had DispatchToProviderJob queued.

events.name: AnalyticsEventDelivered
events.trigger: delivered_provider_count reached eligible_provider_count — all providers delivered successfully.
consumers: webhook::PublishWireEventListener — emits analytics.event.delivered/v1 to external consumers

events.name: AnalyticsEventPartiallyDelivered
events.trigger: All provider retries exhausted AND delivered_provider_count < eligible_provider_count.

events.name: AnalyticsEventSuppressedByConsent
events.trigger: AnalyticsEventObserver.creating — subject has no `analytics` consent.

events.name: AnalyticsEventSuppressedBySampling
events.trigger: SamplingGate rolled a suppress across all eligible providers.

events.name: AnalyticsDeliveryAttempted
events.trigger: DispatchToProviderJob started — HTTP call about to fire.

events.name: AnalyticsDeliverySucceeded
events.trigger: HTTP call returned 2xx (or provider-specific success shape).

events.name: AnalyticsDeliveryFailed
events.trigger: HTTP call returned a non-retryable error OR max attempts exhausted.
consumers: analytics::CircuitBreakerFailureListener — records failure into circuit_breaker_state, may transition to open

events.name: AnalyticsDeliveryRateLimited
events.trigger: HTTP call returned 429 with a Retry-After header.
consumers: analytics::AdjustBackoffListener — extends next_retry_at per Retry-After hint

events.name: AnalyticsProviderCircuitBreakerOpened
events.trigger: CircuitBreakerFailureListener transitioned state from closed → open.
consumers: notifications::DispatchCircuitBreakerNotificationListener — fires AnalyticsProviderCircuitBreakerOpenedNotification to tenant admins + platform-admin on-call

events.name: AnalyticsProviderCircuitBreakerClosed
events.trigger: Half-open probe succeeded close_after_successes times — state → closed.

events.name: AnalyticsProviderConfigured
events.trigger: AnalyticsProviderConfigObserver.created + updated (credential/enabled_event_types/sampling changes).

events.name: AnalyticsProviderDeactivated
events.trigger: AnalyticsProviderConfigObserver — is_active flipped false OR soft-deleted.
consumers: analytics::DrainBatchBufferListener — flushes any queued events for this provider before dropping them

events.name: AnalyticsBatchFlushed
events.trigger: FlushBatchedProviderJob completed all deliveries in a batch.

events.name: AnalyticsBatchFailed
events.trigger: FlushBatchedProviderJob attempted but the provider returned a non-partial failure (e.g. auth error).

events.name: AnalyticsIdentityCreated
events.trigger: AnalyticsIdentityObserver.created — first analytics event carrying a previously-unknown anonymous_id.

events.name: AnalyticsIdentityIdentified
events.trigger: identified_user_id transitions null → non-null.
consumers: analytics::MergeAliasedEventsListener — rewrites subject_id on prior events from AnalyticsIdentity to User (Enterprise + analytics_identity_merge entitlement only)

events.name: AnalyticsIdentityAliased
events.trigger: Two AnalyticsIdentity rows merged via alias() into one canonical identity. Fires on the SURVIVING row.

events.name: AnalyticsIdentitySplit
events.trigger: Deidentification — identified_user_id set back to null (typically GDPR erasure).

events.name: AnalyticsFunnelStepReached
events.trigger: AnalyticsEvent with category='funnel_step' passed capture. Semantic mirror of AnalyticsEventCaptured for consumers that only care about funnel milestones.

events.name: AnalyticsExperimentAssigned
events.trigger: AnalyticsEvent with category='experiment' AND event_name='experiment_variant_assigned' captured. Records the subject's variant assignment for a running experiment.
consumers: analytics::UpdateExperimentAssignmentIndexListener — writes a materialised (experiment_key, subject_id, variant) row for the ExperimentAssignmentReportBuilder
